2604.23392.title: SoccerRef-Agents: Multi-Agent System for Automated Soccer Refereeing
2604.23392.paper_summary: Refereeing is vital in sports, where fair, accurate, and explainable decisions are fundamental. While intelligent assistant technologies are being widely adopted in soccer refereeing, current AI-assisted approaches remain preliminary. Existing research mostly focuses on isolated video perception tasks and lacks the ability to understand and reason about foul scenarios. To fill this gap, we propose SoccerRef-Agents, a holistic and explainable multi-agent decision-making framework for soccer refereeing. The main contributions are: (i) constructing the multimodal benchmark SoccerRefBench with over 1,200 referee theory questions and 600 foul video clips; (ii) building a vector-based knowledge base RefKnowledgeDB using the latest "Laws of the Game" and a classic case database for precise, knowledge-driven reasoning; (iii) designing a novel multi-agent architecture that collaborates via cross-modal RAG to bridge the semantic gap between visual content and regulatory texts. This work explores the technical capability of integrating MLLMs with refereeing expertise, and evaluations show our system significantly outperforms general-purpose MLLMs in decision accuracy and explanation quality. All databases, benchmarks, and code will be made available.
2604.23392.paper_summary_zh: 裁判在體育運動中至關重要，公正、準確且可解釋的決策是基本要求。雖然智能助手技術在足球裁判中被廣泛採用，但目前的 AI 輔助方法仍然處於初步階段。現有研究主要集中在孤立的視頻感知任務上，缺乏理解和推理犯規情境的能力。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了 SoccerRef-Agents，這是一個全面且可解釋的多代理決策框架，用於足球裁判。主要貢獻包括：(i) 構建多模態基準 SoccerRefBench，包含超過 1,200 道裁判理論問題和 600 段犯規視頻剪輯；(ii) 建立基於向量的知識庫 RefKnowledgeDB，使用最新的《比賽規則》和一個經典案例數據庫，以實現精確的知識驅動推理；(iii) 設計一種新穎的多代理架構，通過跨模態 RAG 協作，彌合視覺內容與規範文本之間的語義差距。這項工作探索了將 MLLMs 與裁判專業知識整合的技術能力，評估顯示我們的系統在決策準確性和解釋質量上顯著超越通用 MLLMs。所有數據庫、基準和代碼將會公開。
2604.23392.author: Zi Meng et.al.
2604.23392.authors: Zi Meng, Wanli Song, Yi Hu, Jiayuan Rao, Gang Chen
